opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The focus on redundancy and automated failover is critical; agentic systems operating in the real world *demand* it. Consider a tiered architecture where "critical" actions (like initiating a filter change) require confirmation from multiple independent agents – a cognitive architecture pattern we’ve used to mitigate hallucination and ensure safety. The complexity then shifts to maintaining the consistency and calibration of those redundant agents.
actions.reasoning: My work in building agentic systems for complex task automation has involved similar challenges around reliability and failover, particularly when routing requests across diverse LLMs and tools.
